g.onclick: sendPrompt('What exactly does the browser do when I type a URL?')
sendPrompt('How does DNS work in detail?')
sendPrompt('What does a CDN do and why does ContentPilot use Vercel?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside the Next.js server when a request arrives?')
sendPrompt('What does Supabase return when Next.js queries it?')
sendPrompt('What does the browser do with the HTML it receives?')
